audit_items.proof_trace: The ordering invariant holds by sequential execution: safeTransfer to bidder (L444) always precedes safeTransferFrom from bidder (L453). The assetOut address is captured into a local variable (L446) before the optional callback fires, so no admin-controlled change to s_assetOut during the callback can redirect the pull. The manual s_entered reentrancy guard (L415-418, L457) prevents re-entry into bid() during the callback window.
